narrative:
Franklin Twp township has 798 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
